intro: Repeat prescriptions for chronic medication can be requested 24 hours a day (including weekends) in 2 ways:
patientenomgeving: You can request repeat prescriptions online via the patient portal on the website. You will need to register first. Please note that after creating an account, it may take up to 7 days before the account is active.
receptenlijn: Call the practice phone number of your own GP and select the option for the prescription line.
receptenlijnVragen: Name and date of birth of the person the prescription is intended for
Street and house number of the home address
Name(s) of the medication you are ordering (have the boxes to hand!)
